race.comment: DRAMATICUS (2) finished second two runs back at Pakenham then improved last time out to score by a nose as public elect over 1400m at Bendigo. The runner-up has since won in town, so no reason he doesn't go close again from the gun draw. EM SIXTY (6) hasn't placed in three runs this time in, but they've been in stronger races than this and he now gets to a trip that he's two from two. SEETHRU (11) won two starts back when resuming but couldn't back it up last time over 1400m at Pakenham when fourth. May be looking for this longer trip now. Has good early toe so he should be handy in the run. PHAROAH'S GLORY (14) was in a different class last time with a dominant all-the-way win by 7 lengths at Stawell over 1600m. This is obviously tougher, but going too well to ignore. STOP THE ROCK (1) looks like a horse who will need further, but he tends to bob up at big prices. Has won first-up, has won this trip and has also won here.
